nodes.name: Illadopsis
nodes.summary: Illadopsis（Illadopsis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Brown illadopsis、Pale-breasted illadopsis、Tanzanian illadopsis等9种鸟类。

nodes.name: Tanzanian illadopsis
nodes.summary: The Tanzanian illadopsis (Illadopsis distans) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found in Kenya and Tanzania. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the pale-breasted illadopsis (Illadopsis rufipennis). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Tanzanian illadopsis (Illadopsis distans) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found in Kenya and Tanzania.

nodes.name: Tanzanian illadopsis
